# hetzner_boot_windows (Resource)

Manages the Windows installation boot configuration for a Hetzner dedicated server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Activates a Windows installation on next boot.
resource "hetzner_boot_windows" "example" {
  server_number = 12345
  dist          = "standard"
  lang          = "en_US"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dist` (String) Windows version/distribution.
- `lang` (String) Language.
- `server_number` (Number) The server number.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether Windows install is currently active.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Generated password. Only available on activation.
- `server_ip` (String) Server main IPv4 address.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) Server IPv6 network.
